title: MCUtilities
body:
# MCUtilities

## A Comprehensive Utility Mod for Minecraft

MCUtilities is an all-in-one, server-side utility mod that brings essential quality-of-life features to Minecraft. It's designed for administrators, moderators, and players alike, providing a wide range of features including moderation tools, entity and item management, vein mining, and customizable notifications — all while keeping the Minecraft experience vanilla-friendly.

---

## ✨ Key Features:

### 🔨 Moderation Tools

* Kick, ban, tempban, mute, unban, playerlist, banlist, and mutelist.
* Configurable moderation limits and fallback OP levels.
* LuckPerms integration and fallback rank permissions.

### ⚒️ Entity & Item Management

* Clear entities in a configurable radius with custom filters (items, mobs, XP, etc.).
* Toggleable auto-clear scheduler with customizable intervals.

### ⛏️ Vein Mining

* Mine connected blocks efficiently with smart block detection.
* Multiple mining modes (Normal, Staircase, Tunnel).
* Customizable vein groups (stone, dirt, grass, etc.).

### 📃 Whitelist System

* Easily manage your whitelist with add, remove, and list commands.
* Permissions-based access for safe management.

### 📨 Player Notifications

* Flexible notification system with customizable output (action bar, chat, or off).
* `/mcnotify` command for on-the-fly changes.

---

## 🛠️ Highly Configurable

* `clear-item-config.json`: Customize auto-clear behavior and blacklists.
* `moderation_config.json`: Control moderation settings, time limits, and fallback OP levels.
* `player_notifications.json`: Tailor notifications to your server’s style.
* `veinmine_config.json`: Define block groups and vein mining behavior.

---

## 🧭 Permissions Overview

* LuckPerms support with fine-grained permissions.
* Rank-based moderation (`owner`, `admin`, `moderator`, `helper`).
* Configurable tempban limits per rank.

---

## 🚀 Coming Soon

* 🧲 Magnet System
* 🔒 Claim System

---

## 💬 Support & Feedback

Have questions or suggestions? Join our Discord community: [https://discord.gg/DybchyqNgD](https://discord.gg/DybchyqNgD)

---
